query: SELECT q.id, q.quoteNumber, q.clientName, q.currentVersion, q.revisionCount, COUNT(qv.id) as numVersions FROM quotes q LEFT JOIN quote_versions qv ON qv.quoteId = q.id GROUP BY q.id ORDER BY q.id DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4QE1i3LPsxu4CUm.root --database emCAipNpTbMAUBXoZXdNuB --execute SELECT q.id, q.quoteNumber, q.clientName, q.currentVersion, q.revisionCount, COUNT(qv.id) as numVersions FROM quotes q LEFT JOIN quote_versions qv ON qv.quoteId = q.id GROUP BY q.id ORDER BY q.id DESC LIMIT 10;
